rationale: For Portugal, the Iran deal progress remains the most relevant story as a mild positive signal for energy prices; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life.

top_events.title: Iran says deal to end fighting with US has 'never been closer'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal would ease global energy prices, providing indirect relief on electricity and fuel costs for Portuguese households. No timeline or signing yet.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: US NATO cuts have limited direct impact on Portugal but keep EU defense autonomy debate alive, with marginal implications for EU budget priorities affecting Portugal.
